variants.title: Filtrec A421C10 Spin-On Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec A421C10. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the A421C10 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Spin-On Filter, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 10µ @ β2, Efficiency 2: 27µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 117.0 mm, Length: 297.5 mm, Thread: 1 3/4"-12 UN 2B, Δ Collapse Pressure: 24 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β2, Media Type: Cellulose, Collapse Pressure: 24 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: Donaldson P165705 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On Duramax | Replaces the Filtrec A421C10
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P165705 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On Duramax | Replaces the Filtrec A421C10
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P165705 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On Duramax combines the convenience of a spin-on filter with the robust durability of Donaldsonâ€™s Duramax line. It offers high-efficiency filtration, effectively removing contaminants while withstanding high-pressure environments. Its spin-on design simplifies maintenance, allowing for quick and easy filter changes. Built for heavy-duty applications, this filter provides reliable performance in demanding hydraulic systems, helping to extend equipment life and reduce downtime.

variants.title: HiFi Filter SH 66705 Spin-On Filter | Replaces the Filtrec A421C10
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SH 66705 Spin-On Filter | Replaces the Filtrec A421C10
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SH 66705 Hydraulic Filter. Engineered to protect and optimize the performance of hydraulic systems, this filter delivers exceptional contamination control. Premium filter media captures fine particles and debris that could compromise system integrity, helping to extend the lifespan of critical hydraulic components. By maintaining fluid cleanliness, it reduces wear and tear while supporting consistent pressure levels throughout the system. Perfect for a wide range of hydraulic applications—from industrial machinery to heavy-duty equipment—this filter provides reliable performance even under high-pressure conditions. Its robust construction ensures long-lasting durability, helping to minimize downtime and maintenance costs while maximizing operational efficiency.
specifications: Style: HYDRAULIC FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 122.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 116.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 85.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): 1"3/4-12UNF, Height 1 (H1): 299.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 297.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β2, Efficiency 2: 27µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 117.0 mm, Length: 297.5 mm, Media Type: Cellulose, Thread: 1 3/4"-12 UN 2B, Collapse Pressure: 24 BAR, Seal: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C

variants.title: Mann Filter WH 1257 Hydraulics | Replaces the Filtrec A421C10
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter WH 1257 Hydraulics | Replaces the Filtrec A421C10
variants.description: MANN-FILTER spin-on hydraulic filters offer maximum filtration performance and thus ensure trouble-free operation of the hydraulic system. Thanks to the filter medium, which is specially adapted to the intended use, the finest impurities are separated from the hydraulic fluid.
